## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? Link the originating issue. -->

Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] Breaking change (requires changelog + version bump)
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] AOS spec change (must follow the RFC process in CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] Security patch

## Checklist

- [ ] My commits are signed off (`Signed-off-by:` line present)
- [ ] I have added or updated tests where applicable
- [ ] I have updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] I have not weakened any RLS policy
- [ ] I have not changed the audit-chain hashing algorithm
- [ ] If this PR touches `public/specs/aos-*.yaml`, the RFC discussion is linked
